title: Increased flexibility for recurring items
excerpt: I have meetings that occur on the third Thursday of every month (the date isn’t specific or consistent). I need to set reminders to prepare for these meetings one week prior (i.e the second Thursday of the month). The cu…

posts.author: kylerpowell (Kyler Powell)
posts.cookedHtml: I have meetings that occur on the third Thursday of every month (the date isn’t specific or consistent). I need to set reminders to prepare for these meetings one week prior (i.e the second Thursday of the month). The current functionality only allows for recurring items on a specific date.

posts.author: aquibk (Aquib Zafar)
posts.cookedHtml:
Hi @kylerpowell ,

Are you setting the meeting date on the column in monday board ?

posts.author: bdailey (Barbara Dailey)
posts.cookedHtml: I have a similar issue. We have events scheduled for the 1st and 3rd Thursdays of each month and want to set up an automation based on this timing. The recurring automation only allows for a specific date. Is there a way to set it up based on the needed rhythm? Thanks.
